text:
Once upon an autumn afternoon. There was a girl named Olive.

Olive liked to collect things. Mostly things small like spiders.

On Halloween, Olive decided she wanted a spooky spider.

She caught a big black orb weaver.

Her fat little house hung upside-down all year.

She loved it.

One quiet snowy owl visited.

Owl liked flowers.

They made beautiful flowers together.

That's an old story.



That wasn't quite an old story.

There was a boy named Tim.

He liked big birds.

He got an owl pellet.

He took it to school.

The teacher thought he was rare.

Owl fell love.

Every year, after.

She named him Old Forest.



Well. Old Forest enjoyed life.

There were raccoONS.

He took pictures.

Now Old Forest winters asleep.

But sometimes he wakes.

That's an old story from ancient dreams.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
